description: Standard structural error codes as defined in esm-libraries-spec.md Section 3.4

required_codes.description: Number of ODE equations does not match number of state variables
Variable referenced in an equation is not declared
Species referenced in a reaction is not declared
required_codes.example_context: Reaction substrates/products not in species list

required_codes.description: Parameter referenced in a rate expression is not declared
Coupling entry references a nonexistent model, reaction system, data loader, or operator

required_codes.example_context: Coupling tries to apply undefined operator

required_codes.description: Scoped reference (e.g., 'Model.Subsystem.var') cannot be resolved — a segment in the system path does not exist or the final variable is not declared
discrete_parameters entry does not match a declared parameter
Reaction has both substrates: null and products: null
required_codes.example_context: Reaction with no inputs or outputs

required_codes.description: Observed variable is missing its expression field
Variable in event affects/conditions is not declared

validation_cases.test: Unknown error code should be rejected

requirements.rule: Error codes must be lowercase with underscores
Error codes must be descriptive and unambiguous
Error codes should be stable across library versions
requirements.note: Code changes require major version bump
